headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Overweight on Capital One Financial, Lowers Price Target to $273
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Jeffrey Adelson   maintains Capital One Financial (NYSE:COF) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $300 to $273.
